frontmatter.title: Accordion
frontmatter.description: The accordion component lets users show and hide sections of related content on a page

frontmatter.title: Back link
frontmatter.description: Use the back link component to help users go back to the previous page in a multi-page transaction

frontmatter.title: Breadcrumbs
frontmatter.description: Help users orientate themselves and navigate pages within a hierarchical structure

frontmatter.title: Button
frontmatter.description: Use the button component to help users carry out an action

frontmatter.title: Character count
frontmatter.description: Tell users how many characters or words they can enter into a textarea

frontmatter.title: Checkboxes
frontmatter.description: Let users select one or more options by using the checkboxes component

frontmatter.title: Cookie banner
frontmatter.description: Allow users to accept or reject cookies which are not essential to making your service work.
frontmatter.aliases: Cookies banner, consent banner, GDPR banner, tracking banner, analytics banner

frontmatter.title: Date input
frontmatter.description: Use the date input component to help users enter a memorable date

frontmatter.title: Details
frontmatter.description: Make a page easier to scan by letting users reveal more detailed information only if they need it
frontmatter.aliases: reveal, progressive disclosure, hidden text, show and hide, ShowyHideyThing

frontmatter.title: Error message
frontmatter.description: When there's a validation error, use an error message to explain what went wrong and how to fix it

frontmatter.title: Error summary
frontmatter.description: Use an error summary when there is a validation error

frontmatter.title: Exit this page
frontmatter.description: Give users a way to quickly and safely exit a service, website or application.

frontmatter.title: Fieldset
frontmatter.description: Use the fieldset component to group related form inputs

frontmatter.title: File upload
frontmatter.description: Help users select and upload a file

frontmatter.title: GOV.UK footer
frontmatter.description: The footer provides copyright, licensing and other information about your service and department
frontmatter.aliases: privacy notice, accessibility statement, terms and conditions

frontmatter.title: Generic header
frontmatter.description: A generic header to help services not on GOV.UK

frontmatter.title: GOV.UK header
frontmatter.description: The GOV.UK header shows users that they are on GOV.UK

frontmatter.title: Inset text
frontmatter.description: Use the inset text component to differentiate a block of text from the content that surrounds it

frontmatter.title: Notification banner
frontmatter.description: Use a notification banner to tell the user about something they need to know about, but that’s not directly related to the page content
frontmatter.aliases: alert, warning, success message, important message, flash message

frontmatter.title: Pagination
frontmatter.description: Help users navigate collections of numbered pages like search results

frontmatter.title: Panel
frontmatter.description: Use the Panel component to display important information in within confirmation and interruption pages
frontmatter.aliases: confirmation box, results box, reference number, application complete, application number

frontmatter.title: Password input
frontmatter.description: Help users accessibly enter passwords

frontmatter.title: Phase banner
frontmatter.description: Use the phase banner component to show users your service is still being worked on
frontmatter.aliases: alpha banner, beta banner, prototype banner, status banner, feedback banner

frontmatter.title: Radios
frontmatter.description: Let users select a single option from a list using the radios component

frontmatter.title: Select
frontmatter.description: Help users select an item from a list
frontmatter.aliases: dropdown, list box, combo box, pop-up menu

frontmatter.title: Service navigation
frontmatter.description: Service navigation helps users understand that they’re using your service and lets them navigate around your service

frontmatter.title: Skip link
frontmatter.description: Use the skip link component to help keyboard-only users skip to the main content on a page

frontmatter.title: Summary list
frontmatter.description: Use the summary list to summarise information, for example, a user’s responses at the end of a form.

frontmatter.title: Table
frontmatter.description: Use the table component to make information easier to compare and scan for users

frontmatter.title: Tabs
frontmatter.description: Tabs can be a helpful way of letting users quickly switch between related information

frontmatter.title: Tag
frontmatter.description: The Tag component indicates the status of something, such as an item on a task list or a phase banner

frontmatter.title: Task list
frontmatter.description: The task list component displays all the tasks a user needs to do, and allows users to easily identify which ones are done and which they still need to do.

frontmatter.title: Text input
frontmatter.description: Help users enter information with the text input component
frontmatter.aliases: text box, text field, input field, text entry box

frontmatter.title: Textarea
frontmatter.description: Help users provide detailed information using the textarea component
frontmatter.aliases: multi-line text box, multi-line text field

frontmatter.title: Warning text
frontmatter.description: Use the warning text component when you need to warn users about something important, such as legal consequences of an action, or lack of action, that they might take

frontmatter.title: Addresses
frontmatter.description: Help users provide an address

frontmatter.title: Bank details
frontmatter.description: How to ask users for their bank details

frontmatter.title: Check a service is suitable
frontmatter.description: Ask users questions to help them work out if they can or should use your service

frontmatter.title: Check answers
frontmatter.description: Let users check their answers before submitting information to a service

frontmatter.title: Complete multiple tasks
frontmatter.description: Task lists help users understand tasks involved in completing a transaction, the order they should complete tasks in and when they have completed tasks

frontmatter.title: Confirm a phone number
frontmatter.description: Identifying users when they sign in
frontmatter.aliases: 2FA, MFA, multi-factor authentication, security code, telephone number, phone number, text message, two-factor authentication

frontmatter.title: Confirm an email address
frontmatter.description: Use an email confirmation loop to check that a user has access to a specific email

frontmatter.title: Confirmation pages
frontmatter.description: Let users know they’ve completed a transaction

frontmatter.title: Contact a department or service team
frontmatter.description: Contact a department or service team

frontmatter.title: Cookies page
frontmatter.description: Tell users about the cookies you’re setting on their device and let them accept or reject different types of non-essential cookies.
frontmatter.aliases: Privacy settings, Cookie settings, tracking settings

frontmatter.title: Create a username
frontmatter.description: Help users to create a unique and memorable username to sign into a service with

frontmatter.title: Create accounts
frontmatter.description: Help users create an account for your service

frontmatter.title: Dates
frontmatter.description: Help users enter or select a date

frontmatter.title: Email addresses
frontmatter.description: Help users enter a valid email address

frontmatter.title: Equality information
frontmatter.description: This pattern explains how to ask users for equality information
frontmatter.aliases: protected characteristics, ethnic group, diversity, demographic, age, disability, marriage, civil partnership, religion, sex, gender identity, sexual orientation

frontmatter.title: Exit a page quickly
frontmatter.description: Give users a way to quickly and safely exit a service, website or application.

frontmatter.title: Interruption pages
frontmatter.description: Pause the user journey to give them important information

frontmatter.title: Names
frontmatter.description: Help users correctly enter their name

frontmatter.title: National Insurance numbers
frontmatter.description: Ask users to provide their National Insurance number

frontmatter.title: Navigate a service
frontmatter.description: Help users know they’re using your service and navigate around it

frontmatter.title: Page not found pages
frontmatter.description: A page not found tells someone we cannot find the page they were trying to view. They are also known as 404 pages.

frontmatter.title: Passwords
frontmatter.description: Help users to create and enter secure and memorable passwords

frontmatter.title: Payment card details
frontmatter.description: How to ask users for their payment card details

frontmatter.title: Phone numbers
frontmatter.description: Help users enter a valid phone number

frontmatter.title: There is a problem with the service pages
frontmatter.description: This is a page that tells someone there is something wrong with the service. They are also known as 500 pages

frontmatter.title: Question pages
frontmatter.description: Follow this pattern whenever you need to ask users questions within your service

frontmatter.title: Service unavailable pages
frontmatter.description: This is a page that tells someone a service is unavailable. It should say when the service will be available or what to do if it is permanently closed

frontmatter.title: Start using a service
frontmatter.description: Create a starting point for your digital service on GOV.UK

frontmatter.title: Step by step navigation
frontmatter.description: A starting point for your digital service on GOV.UK

frontmatter.title: Understand the impact of an emergency on your service
Recover from validation errors
frontmatter.description: Check the answers users give to make sure they’re valid - and if there’s an error, tell them what's wrong and how to fix it
